meaning: adj.非常坚硬的,坚定不移的;n.[冶]金刚合金
examples: The body of the Tathagata is adamantine and indestructible.
Beauty, grace, strength, and adamantine hardness constitute the perfect body.
Surely the adamantine barrier of her marriage with another could not be pieced like this!
His fiscal discipline turned out to be flexible but, for better or worse, Mr Osborne's seems adamantine.
Evert was emotionless on the court, gutting weaker-willed opponents with her adamantine demeanor.
